---
id: modify-vrm-mouth-expressions
title: "Modify VRM mouth expressions"
description: "Modify only mouth-related expression weights for the specified VRM model. This is useful for lip-sync where you want to update mouth shapes without affecting other expressions."
sidebar_label: "Modify VRM mouth expressions"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "patch api-method"
info_path: docs/reference/api/homunculus-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Modify VRM mouth expressions"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"patch"}
  path={"/vrm/{entity_id}/expressions/mouth"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Modify only mouth-related expression weights for the specified VRM model. This is useful for lip-sync where you want to update mouth shapes without affecting other expressions.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
